parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ content: '💰 **' + $('Score Message').first().json.temperature.toUpperCase() + ' LEAD** — ' + $('Score Message').first().json.email + '\nScore: ' + $('Score Message').first().json.last_engagement_score + ' | Seriousness: ' + $('Score Message').first().json.estimated_seriousness + '\nNext: ' + $('Score Message').first().json.next_action }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, temperature: $('Score Message').first().json.temperature, score: $('Score Message').first().json.last_engagement_score }) }}
